data.title: Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. II prices $125M IPO of 12.5M units at $10 each on Nasdaq Global Market tier.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. II disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering which consists of 12,500,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be listed on The Nasdaq Global Market tier of The Nasdaq Stock Market.

data.title: Bstarcom to showcase C-UAS system in Poland demo and deliver "3-in-1" system in July, through government program.
data.description: In South Korea's capital Seoul, on February 12, 2026, it was reported that Bstarcom has been connected with the Ministry of Defense in Poland as part of a government-driven export initiative. As per the arrangement, Bstarcom is set to supply its advanced hybrid counter-drone system known as the "3-in-1" to Poland by July. This collaboration is a result of a targeted export promotion program and signifies a significant step in Bstarcom's expansion strategy. The demonstration and implementation of this system are crucial milestones in the bilateral partnership, showcasing the effectiveness and potential of Bstarcom's technology in the global market.

data.title: Global Sourcing Fair Vietnam 2026 set on April 22-24 at Ho Chi Minh City expecting 12,000+ attendees.
data.description: In Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, the Global Sourcing Fair Vietnam, now in its fourth edition, will take place from April 22 to 24, 2026 at the Saigon Exhibition & Convention Center (SECC). The event, hosted by Global Sources, anticipates the participation of over 12,000 industry professionals.

data.title: CFTC appoints Coinbase & Ripple execs to its 35-member advisory committee; headed by Chair Mike Selig, a total of 12 charter members were initially nominated before the final list was expanded to 35 on Thursday.
data.description: In January, the chair of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, Mike Selig, established the Innovation Advisory Committee with an initial group of 12 charter members. The committee has since been expanded to include a total of 35 members as of Thursday.

data.title: InnoCare begins Phase II/III trial of TYK2 inhibitor Soficitinib for Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria in China, targeting dermatology market.
data.description: Soficitinib, a product currently in development, shows promising prospects within the expansive field of dermatology.

data.title: Arcos Dorados B.V. reports early results of a tender offer for up to $150 million of its 6.125% Sustainability-Linked Senior Notes Due 2029.
data.description: Montevideo, Uruguay - In a recent announcement, Arcos Dorados B.V. disclosed the early tender outcomes for its offer to acquire up to U.S.$150,000,000 in principal amount of 6.125% Sustainability-Linked Senior Notes due 2029. The company has the discretion to increase the maximum tender amount. The tender offer aims to repurchase a portion of its outstanding Notes. Further details regarding the offer's terms and conditions have been established.

data.title: Faraday Future recruits leading US dealers at FF Partner Summit in Las Vegas on Feb. 5. Positive progress shared post-summit. NASDAQ: FFAI.
data.description: LOS ANGELES--Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a California-based global smart electric mobility company, reported positive developments post its recent FF Partner (Par) Summit in Las Vegas on February 5, 2026. The summit unveiled the FF Par model as a cutting-edge collaborative platform for a new Co-Crea venture.

data.title: Coherus Oncology, Inc. prices public offering of 28.6M shares at $1.75/share, expecting $50.1M gross proceeds by Feb 17.
data.description: Redwood City-based Coherus Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHRS) has disclosed the pricing details for its recent underwritten public offering. The company is offering 28,600,000 shares of common stock at a rate of $1.75 per share, generating an estimated gross profit of about $50.1 million. The underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional 4,290,000 shares of common stock at the same price. The closing of this offering is anticipated around February 17, 2026, conditioned upon meeting standard closing requirements.
